question.label: Wait pattern
question.name: What makes you hold back until the analysis is complete?
question.description: Drills into the specific habit she named to surface what is driving the delayed stakeholder engagement.

answer: That slows trust because stakeholders feel surprised late.

assessment.note: She names a clear negative consequence of her pattern — late surprises erode trust — which signals mild clarity and engagement issues, but no wellbeing signal.

new_queue.label: Trust gap
new_queue.name: Where exactly are you falling short on stakeholder trust right now?

new_queue.label: Senior bar
new_queue.name: What does good look like at Senior level in your view?

new_queue.label: Signal choices
new_queue.name: What do you choose to make visible before the work is done?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What is the first concrete thing you want to move by our next conversation?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 5)

history.answer_excerpt: I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I tend to wait until analysis is complete before socializing direction.
That slows trust because stakeholders feel surprised late.
